items.original_text: We argue that such boundaries are artificial and perhaps unnecessary, given the reasoning abilities we seek to teach are not governed by the format. As evidence, we use the latest advances in language modeling to build a single pre- trained QA model, UNIFIEDQA, that performs well across 20 QA datasets spanning 4 diverse formats.
items.claim_text: UNIFIEDQA是一个单一预训练问答模型，在跨越4种不同格式的20个问答数据集上表现良好 [EV-001]

items.original_text: UNIFIEDQA performs on par with 8 different models that were trained on individual datasets themselves.
items.claim_text: UNIFIEDQA的性能与8个在各自数据集上单独训练的专用模型相当 [EV-002]

items.original_text: Even when faced with 12 unseen datasets of observed formats, UNIFIEDQA performs surprisingly well, showing strong generalization from its out-of-format training data.
items.claim_text: 面对12个未见过的但格式已知的数据集，UNIFIEDQA表现出惊人的良好性能，显示了从格式外训练数据的强泛化能力 [EV-003]

items.original_text: Finally, fine- tuning this pre- trained QA model into specialized models results in a new state of the art on 10 factoid and commonsense QA datasets, establishing UNIFIEDQA as a strong starting point for building QA systems.
items.claim_text: 对UNIFIEDQA进行微调后，在10个事实型和常识型问答数据集上取得了新的最先进结果，表明它是构建问答系统的强大起点 [EV-004]

items.original_text: We convert each of our target datasets into a text-in/text-out format (Raffel et al., 2020; Lewis et al., 2020; Radford et al., 2019b). The question always comes first, followed by some additional information (context paragraph or candidate answers, or both). We use "\n" separators between different parts of the input. This ensures having a human-like encoding while not making it overly-specific to a certain format.
items.claim_text: UNIFIEDQA将所有目标数据集转换为文本输入/文本输出格式：问题在前，随后是附加信息（上下文段落或候选答案或两者），各部分用换行符分隔，避免特定格式的过度特化 [EV-005]

items.original_text: To re- emphasize, unlike prior work (Raffel et al., 2020), we do not specify any task-, dataset-, or format-specific prefixes in the input representation. Whether the answer should be extracted or abstracted, and whether from the provided context paragraph or candidate answers (or the fact that these even are candidate answers) is expected to be inferred by the system.
items.claim_text: 与先前工作不同，UNIFIEDQA在输入表示中不指定任何任务、数据集或格式特定的前缀，系统需要自行推断答案格式 [EV-006]

items.original_text: The specific pre- trained QA model we provide and use in all our experiments is trained on representative datasets for each of the 4 formats discussed earlier. We empirically chose the following 8 seed datasets for training UNIFIEDQA, based on their effectiveness in our pilot study (details deferred to Section 5) assessing which datasets are most valuable for out-of-format training: EX: SQuAD 1.1, SQuAD 2.0 AB: NarrativeQA MC: RACE, ARC, OBQA, MCTest YN: BoolQ
items.claim_text: UNIFIEDQA在8个种子数据集上训练：提取式SQuAD 1.1和SQuAD 2.0，抽象式NarrativeQA，多项选择RACE、ARC、OBQA、MCTest，以及是非式BoolQ [EV-007]

items.original_text: Unless otherwise noted, we use the largest available T5 model (11B parameters) as the starting point for training our model and call the system UNIFIEDQA.
items.claim_text: UNIFIEDQA默认使用最大的T5模型（110亿参数）作为训练起点 [EV-008]

items.original_text: The results show that UNIFIEDQA performs almost as good as individual T5 models targeted to each dataset. In some cases UNIFIEDQA performs even better than the single-dataset experts (e.g., on OBQA or NQA). On average (last column) UNIFIEDQA clearly outperforms the ensemble of dataset/format-specific systems.
items.claim_text: UNIFIEDQA的性能几乎与每个数据集的专用T5模型相当，在某些情况下甚至更好（如在OBQA或NQA上），平均性能明显优于数据集/格式特定系统的集成 [EV-009]

items.original_text: On average (last column), UNIFIEDQA shows much stronger generalization across a wide range of datasets. on 9 out of 12 datasets, UNIFIEDQA shows a better generalization than any single-format expert.
items.claim_text: 平均而言，UNIFIEDQA在广泛数据集上表现出更强的泛化能力；在12个数据集中有9个，其泛化性能优于任何单一格式的专家模型 [EV-010]
items.audit_note: claim声称'在多个数据集上'表现更好，但原文只提到UNIFIEDQA微调后优于T5和BART以及之前的最佳分数，没有明确说多个数据集

items.original_text: We see that fine- tuning on UNIFIEDQA consistently dominates fine- tuning on T5 and BART, respectively. It also dominates the best previous scores on the datasets.
items.claim_text: 在多个数据集上，对UNIFIEDQA进行微调持续优于对T5和BART进行微调，并且也优于这些数据集上之前的最佳分数 [EV-011]
items.audit_note: claim声称这是消融实验结果，但原文说的是'importance'贡献分析，不是消融实验，claim扩大了声明范围

items.original_text: Looking at first few rows of the table, BoolQ, SQuAD 2.0, OBQA, NarQA are the top four contributing datasets, each with a different format. SQuAD 1.1 has the least importance, presumably because it is mostly covered by SQuAD 2.0.
items.claim_text: 消融实验表明，BoolQ、SQuAD 2.0、OBQA和NarrativeQA是贡献最大的四个种子数据集，每个来自不同格式；SQuAD 1.1重要性最低，可能因其内容已被SQuAD 2.0覆盖 [EV-012]

items.original_text: This study suggests that in order to build an effective unified QA system, it suffices to have a relatively small set of datasets as long as the set includes representatives from each format.
items.claim_text: 要构建有效的统一问答系统，只需一个相对较小的数据集集合，只要该集合包含每种格式的代表性数据集即可 [EV-013]
